talk.h: Describe your task. Get a quote in one chat.
talk.lede: This chat is the real intake agent. It asks what you need, what your budget is, and your deadline — then routes the brief to a certified operator. You get a human reply on your contact within 30 minutes.
talk.p1.p: No forms, no ticket fields. Just tell it what you want shipped.
talk.p2.p: $100 minimum. Budget only moves after you approve the operator's plan.
talk.p3.p: The brief goes to the top-matched operator. They reply on your contact with scope, timeline and a fixed price.
talk.alt_p: One-screen order: task, budget, deadline, contact. Same operator on the other side.
